center.name: 首都區 (委內瑞拉)
center.summary: 首都區 (委內瑞拉)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Marble-faced bristle tyrant、Rufous-lored tyrannulet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of Venezuela's Yaracuy and southern Aragua states and in the coastal mountains from Carabobo through Aragua into the Federal District

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of Yaracuy state, in the section of the Coastal Cordillera from western Carabobo east to Aragua and the Capital District, and away from the coast in Miranda and in Guatopo National Park on the Miranda-Guárico border
